title: OUTREACH - 211info
text: ST VINCENT DE PAUL THRIFT STORE AND FOOD PANTRY OUTREACH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides limited emergency assistance with rent, utilities, laundry vouchers, and other forms of assistance. 501 NW 25th Street Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Low-income households or houseless individuals Hours: Monday/Wednesday 1:30pm-3pm Email (541) 286-4183 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 286-4183 Main phone Main phone (541) 286-4183 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Varies by service AREA SERVED: City of Corvallis, Benton County only TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On 25th Street between Fillmore Avenue and Taylor Street. The entrance for the Food Pantry and Thrift Store is on the east side of the building. Entrance for Outreach is on the west side of the building. Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Laundry Vouchers Rent Payment Assistance Undesignated Temporary Financial Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY MATERIAL GOODS - THRIFT STORE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ST VINCENT DE PAUL THRIFT STORE AND FOOD PANTRY
